rules.name: PHP eval() with variable/encoded input
rules.description: Detects PHP eval() with variable, encoded, or user-controlled input
rules._comment: Narrowed: bare eval() matches legitimate text like 'evaluation('. Now requires variable ($), decoding function, or string concatenation as argument

rules.name: PHP assert() with variable input
rules.description: Detects PHP assert() with variable or encoded input
rules._comment: Narrowed: bare assert() is too common in normal text. Now requires variable or decoding function

rules.name: PHP create_function()
rules.description: Detects PHP create_function() usage

rules.name: PHP preg_replace /e modifier
rules.description: Detects preg_replace with /e modifier

rules.name: PHP system() with input
rules.description: Detects system() with variable or user-controlled input
rules._comment: Narrowed: 'system(' matches text like 'operating system (Windows)'. Now requires variable or string concat

rules.name: PHP exec() with input
rules.description: Detects exec() with variable or user-controlled input
rules._comment: Narrowed: 'exec(' matches 'executive ('. Now requires variable or string concat

rules.name: PHP shell_exec() with input
rules.description: Detects shell_exec() with variable or user-controlled input
rules._comment: Narrowed: requires variable or string argument

rules.name: PHP passthru() with input
rules.description: Detects passthru() with variable or user-controlled input
rules._comment: Narrowed: requires variable or string argument

rules.name: PHP popen() with input
rules.description: Detects popen() with variable or user-controlled input
rules._comment: Narrowed: requires variable or string argument

rules.name: PHP proc_open() with input
rules.description: Detects proc_open() with variable or user-controlled input
rules._comment: Narrowed: requires variable or string argument

rules.name: Backtick Execution
rules.description: Detects backtick command execution with shell commands
rules._comment: Narrowed: requires known shell command inside backticks - bare backticks match Markdown and template literals

rules.name: PHP call_user_func() with encoded input
rules.description: Detects call_user_func() with variable or encoded input indicating exploitation
rules._comment: Narrowed: bare call_user_func is used extensively in WordPress core and plugins. Now requires superglobal or decoding function

rules.name: PHP include/require with user input
rules.description: Detects dynamic include/require with user-controlled input
rules._comment: Narrowed: only flags include/require when combined with superglobal user input variables to avoid matching legitimate PHP code

rules.name: Shell Command - wget with output
rules.description: Detects wget command injection with output redirection
rules._comment: Narrowed: bare 'wget url' matches blog content mentioning wget. Now requires output flags (-O, -P) or shell redirection

rules.name: Shell Command - curl with output
rules.description: Detects curl command injection with output
rules._comment: Narrowed: requires -o/-O output flag or pipe to shell

rules.name: Shell Command - nc/netcat
rules.description: Detects netcat command injection

rules.name: Bash Reverse Shell
rules.description: Detects bash reverse shell attempt

rules.name: Python Command Execution
rules.description: Detects python os.system usage

rules.name: Perl Command Execution
rules.description: Detects perl command execution

rules.name: Command Substitution $(...)
rules.description: Detects $() command substitution with shell commands
rules._comment: Narrowed: requires known shell command inside $() - bare $() matches legitimate content like jQuery and template syntax

rules.name: Variable Expansion ${...}
rules.description: Detects ${} variable expansion with shell-specific patterns
rules._comment: Narrowed: only matches shell-specific environment variables - generic ${var} is used everywhere (JS templates, PHP, etc.)

rules.name: Pipe Command Chain
rules.description: Detects piped command chain

rules.name: Semicolon Command Chain
rules.description: Detects semicolon command chaining

rules.name: PHP ReflectionFunction
rules.description: Detects ReflectionFunction exploitation

rules.name: PHP unserialize()
rules.description: Detects potential unserialize exploitation
